name: electron-app
description: A desktop application for automatically detecting and extracting individual images from scanned documents containing multiple photos or images
author: Albert Chu <albertchu539@gmail.com>

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others "pnpm run build:watch" "wait-on dist/main.js dist/preload.cjs dist/renderer/renderer.html && NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build: tsc && vite build --config vite.main.config.ts && vite build --config vite.preload.config.ts && vite build
scripts.build:prod: tsc && vite build --config vite.main.config.ts && vite build --config vite.preload.config.ts && vite build --mode production
